name: Honey Mustard Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a pan over medium heat.
2. Mix in mustard, honey, and curry powder until well combined.
3. Place chicken strips in the mixture, ensuring they are fully coated.
4. Cook for 30-45 minutes at 350°F (175°C), stirring occasionally to coat the chicken strips evenly.
